mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( login_id, password, name, email, role_code, created_at ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{roleCode}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userid} AND is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT * FROM user WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT * FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY user_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET login_id = #{loginId}, name = #{name}, email = #{email}, role_code = #{roleCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
UPDATE user SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET is_deleted = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
